theme_archetype.secondary: Archetype 3 (Pastel & Soft) mixed with Neo-Brutalist elements for high visual impact
theme_archetype.rationale: The user requested a visually striking ('llamativa y vistosa') UI with playful typography ('Burbuja' and 'Dibujo'). A Neo-Brutalist approach with high-contrast, colorful themes makes the app immediately engaging and distinct from standard task managers, elevating it to top 1% design.

layout_and_spacing.container: max-w-4xl mx-auto p-4 sm:p-6 lg:p-8 min-h-screen
layout_and_spacing.header: flex justify-between items-center mb-12 p-6 rounded-2xl border-2 border-border bg-card shadow-[var(--shadow)]
layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: Grid layout for tasks using gap-6. If empty, center the empty state.
layout_and_spacing.task_item: p-5 rounded-xl border-2 border-border bg-card shadow-[var(--shadow)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[var(--hover-shadow)] flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4 items-start sm:items-center relative overflow-hidden

settings_modal.accessibility: Accessible via Gear icon button. Hidden by default. Wraps settings content.
settings_modal.styles: fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm flex items-center justify-center p-4
settings_modal.content_styles: bg-card w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl border-4 border-border shadow-[var(--hover-shadow)] p-8 relative flex flex-col gap-6
settings_modal.close_button: absolute top-4 right-4 text-muted hover:text-text bg-background border-2 border-border rounded-full p-2 transition-transform hover:scale-110

task_input.form: flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4 mb-10 w-full
task_input.input: flex-1 p-4 rounded-xl border-2 border-border bg-card text-text placeholder-muted focus:outline-none focus:ring-4 focus:ring-primary/20 shadow-[var(--shadow)] text-lg font-medium
task_input.datetime: p-4 rounded-xl border-2 border-border bg-card text-text focus:outline-none shadow-[var(--shadow)]
task_input.button: px-8 py-4 rounded-xl border-2 border-border bg-primary text-card font-bold text-lg hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform shadow-[var(--shadow)] flex items-center gap-2 justify-center cursor-pointer

task_list.empty_state: flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-24 text-center bg-card border-4 border-border border-dashed rounded-3xl opacity-80
task_list.checkbox: w-6 h-6 rounded-full border-2 border-border text-primary focus:ring-primary cursor-pointer accent-primary shrink-0

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. In App.js, replace the `FONTS` array. Keep 'classic' (Work Sans/DM Sans), remove 'modern' and 'technical', and add 'burbuja' (Fredoka/Nunito) and 'dibujo' (Caveat/Comic Neue). Update the CSS imports in index.css accordingly.
2. Remove the `<aside>` panel component that was used for settings. Create a new `SettingsModal` component that acts as a centered modal (dialog overlay) wrapping the theme and font selectors.
3. Add a single `<button>` with a `<Settings>` (Gear) icon in the `<header>` that opens the `SettingsModal`. This replaces the mobile-only setting toggle.
4. Completely revamp `index.css` and `App.css` variables to use the striking Neo-Brutalist color variables provided in `color_palette.themes`. The app should look highly vibrant, tactile, and fun.
5. Use CSS custom properties for shadows (`--shadow`, `--hover-shadow`) to give the inputs and cards a 'pop-out' brutalist feel, adjusting based on the active theme.
6. Apply generous padding (`p-6` or `p-8`) to containers. Increase font sizes for inputs and buttons to make them feel bold and approachable.
7. Ensure ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, checkboxes, toggles) have descriptive `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='settings-btn'`, `data-testid='theme-light'`).
8. Keep the existing 4 theme IDs (`light`, `dark`, `corporate_blue`, `nature_green`) so local storage works seamlessly, but style them according to the new vibrant definitions.
